tool.name: whatsapp_bulk_send
tool.description: Send a message to multiple WhatsApp contacts in parallel using concurrent browser tabs. Use this instead of calling whatsapp_send_message multiple times. Pass contact names as a comma-separated string.

parameters.name: contact_names
parameters.description: Comma-separated contact or group names (e.g. 'John,Family Group,Alice')

parameters.name: message
parameters.description: Message text to send to each contact
